info.name: Xero Payroll UK
PayrollUk
Retrieves employees

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter by first name, lastname, and/or whether they are an off-payroll worker

params.description: Page number which specifies the set of records to retrieve. By default the number of the records per set is 100.

info.name: Retrieves timesheets

params.name: page
params.description: Page number which specifies the set of records to retrieve. By default the number of the records per set is 100.

params.name: status
params.description: filter results by any timesheets with a matching timesheet status

params.name: startDate
params.description: filter results by any timesheets with a startDate on or after the provided date

params.name: endDate
params.description: filter results by any timesheets with a endDate on or before the provided date

params.name: sort
params.description: sort the order of timesheets returned. The default is based on the timesheets createdDate, sorted oldest to newest. Currently, the only other option is to reverse the order based on the timesheets startDate, sorted newest to oldest.

info.name: Retrieves pay runs

params.name: page
params.description: Page number which specifies the set of records to retrieve. By default the number of the records per set is 100.

params.name: status
params.description: By default get payruns will return all the payruns for an organization. You can add GET https://api.xero.com/payroll.xro/2.0/payRuns?statu={PayRunStatus} to filter the payruns by status.
